heroHeadline: Kim Opens Ukraine War Memorial; Russia-DPRK Sign 2027–2031 Military Pact
heroSubtitle: Kim Jong-un inaugurates memorial museum for ~2,000 DPRK soldiers killed in Ukraine, while Russia and North Korea formalize a 5-year military cooperation framework — the deepest alliance since the Cold War
footerNote: Data sourced from US/ROK official reports, KCNA, UN panels, IAEA, and institutional analyses. North Korea does not publish national statistics — economic figures are estimates with wide uncertainty ranges.
